title: astragalus apollineus
intro: Astragalus apollineus, also known as Huang Qi, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, native to China and the Korean Peninsula. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. Astragalus apollineus is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve overall health and well-being. It is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support the body's natural defenses against stress and disease.
